programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Needing a way out, Thony tries to make a deal with Garrett to save herself and help Arman, but Arman doesn't trust any promises made by the FBI.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: A whip-smart Cambodian doctor comes to the US for medical treatment to save her son, but when the system fails and pushes her into hiding, she uses her cunning and intelligence to fight back.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: A whip-smart Cambodian doctor comes to the US for medical treatment to save her son, but when the system fails and pushes her into hiding, she uses her cunning and intelligence to fight back.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony attempts to sever ties with the crime syndicate when the FBI comes asking questions, but when her son's health declines, she crosses a moral line, getting deeper involved with the syndicate.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony is given a dire ultimatum by Garrett that could compromise her son's access to medical care. Arman calls into question his real role within the family.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Facing a heartbreaking setback with Luca's treatment, Thony turns to Arman for help, who escalates the situation to get results.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: When Garrett puts Thony in a threatening position, she must choose between her loyalty to Arman and saving Fiona from deportation.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: While Fiona and Thony's relationship is strained due to Thony's lies, Arman uses Thony's relationship with Garrett to feed information to the FBI.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: While Fiona and Thony's relationship is strained due to Thony's lies, Arman uses Thony's relationship with Garrett to feed information to the FBI.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.sub-title: Our Father Who Art In Vegas
programme.desc: Thony's marital issues are amplified when Marco starts asking tough questions. Meanwhile, Arman is determined to make his way out from under Hayak.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.sub-title: Our Father Who Art In Vegas
programme.desc: Thony's marital issues are amplified when Marco starts asking tough questions. Meanwhile, Arman is determined to make his way out from under Hayak.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony enlists Arman's help to get to Mexico for Luca's transplant, but plans go dangerously off course, forcing her to call upon both the former doctor and the new-found 'gangsta' in herself.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony enlists Arman's help to get to Mexico for Luca's transplant, but plans go dangerously off course, forcing her to call upon both the former doctor and the new-found 'gangsta' in herself.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: After Luca is kidnapped by his father, Thony enlists the FBI to find her son. Meanwhile, an incident involving Chris forces Fiona to shield her son by any means necessary.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony's in-laws come to Las Vegas. Meanwhile, Thony must help Arman by meeting with Robert Kamdar, Nadia's gregarious and charming ex-lover.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony's in-laws come to Las Vegas. Meanwhile, Thony must help Arman by meeting with Robert Kamdar, Nadia's gregarious and charming ex-lover.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony joins Arman and Nadia in a risky new venture to save Luca's life, while Fiona fights to protect Chris when the threat of damaging evidence emerges.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony joins Arman and Nadia in a risky new venture to save Luca's life, while Fiona fights to protect Chris when the threat of damaging evidence emerges.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: After Fiona puts herself in a dangerous situation, Thony resorts to calling Arman for help. Garrett works to get put back on the Cortez case.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: After Fiona puts herself in a dangerous situation, Thony resorts to calling Arman for help. Garrett works to get put back on the Cortez case.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Arman and Nadia realise Thony's ethical methods aren't making them enough money. Fiona takes the lead on starting her and Thony's new cleaning business.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: An unexpected trio emerges in the mission to take down Cortes, as Arman and Nadia's relationship hits a breaking point. Fiona attempts to keep her family safe.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Detective Flores digs deeper into the cause of Marco's death. Meanwhile, Thony, Arman and Garrett team up to bring down Kamdar.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Detective Flores digs deeper into the cause of Marco's death. Meanwhile, Thony, Arman and Garrett team up to bring down Kamdar.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: JD temporarily takes in Fiona and the kids during a time of need. Meanwhile, Garrett changes strategies in his attempt to stop Kamdar.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: JD temporarily takes in Fiona and the kids during a time of need. Meanwhile, Garrett changes strategies in his attempt to stop Kamdar.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: As Luca grows sicker, Thony will do anything to get him a new medication, including asking Kamdar for help. Meanwhile, Arman confronts Nadia about her secret.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: As Luca grows sicker, Thony will do anything to get him a new medication, including asking Kamdar for help. Meanwhile, Arman confronts Nadia about her secret.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: As Arman and Nadia plan their riskiest scheme, Thony questions her alliances while Luca's health worsens and Garrett closes in on a suspect.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: As Arman and Nadia plan their riskiest scheme, Thony questions her alliances while Luca's health worsens and Garrett closes in on a suspect.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony is confronted by Garrett regarding the truth behind Maya's death as Nadia tries to stay on Kamdar's good side. Meanwhile, Fiona helps Luca celebrate his birthday.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony is confronted by Garrett regarding the truth behind Maya's death as Nadia tries to stay on Kamdar's good side. Meanwhile, Fiona helps Luca celebrate his birthday.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: After Thony, Arman and Garrett work together to come up with a plan to take down Kamdar once and for all, Thony decides to take things into her own hands.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: After Luca is kidnapped by his father, Thony enlists the FBI to find her son. Meanwhile, an incident involving Chris forces Fiona to shield her son by any means necessary.

programme.desc: Thony's in-laws come to Las Vegas. Meanwhile, Thony must help Arman by meeting with Robert Kamdar, Nadia's gregarious and charming ex-lover.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1999 R16 WC v FRE
programme.desc: The 90s the decade that delivered. There would be three new teams, for the first time non-Victorian clubs would take premiership honours and it was a decade of goalkicking maestros Jason Dunstall, Gary Ablett and Tony Lockett.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Members of the Army, Navy, Air Force and Marine Corps battle for $50,000 in challenges that take place on and around the USS Hornet aircraft carrier in California.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Members of the Army, Navy, Air Force and Marine Corps battle for $50,000 in challenges that take place on and around the USS Hornet aircraft carrier in California.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Alex is hauling a dangerous load of deadly compressed gases, but at hurricane alley, high winds have already pushed one truck off the road, and any mistake Alex makes could have explosive consequences.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: Greg Jones has done it! The American who quit his job as a power plant worker, flew from Tennessee to Iceland, and tried out for a job on an Icelandic longliner, has now passed his three-week trial.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: It's the grand final and by the end of the show one competitor will claim Greg Davies' gilded bonce as her own.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: It's the grand final and by the end of the show one competitor will claim Greg Davies' gilded bonce as her own.

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In Minnesota, a cigarette-infested 1973 Dodge Charger goes from an ashtray on wheels to smoking hot; in Georgia, a foul-smelling Acura covered in food and trash comes clean.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Wayne Mallows gets way more than he bargained for when he buys a haunted B&B, a family's dream home turns into a nightmare for their teenage son and Linda Bogert buys the historic home of her dreams.

programme.title: Velma
programme.sub-title: The Sins Of The Fathers And Some Of The Mothers
programme.desc: Velma vows to resolve her daddy issues. Norville rebels against his father's beta lifestyle. Fred fights against his family's anti-feminist ways.

programme.title: Velma
programme.sub-title: The Sins Of The Fathers And Some Of The Mothers
programme.desc: Velma vows to resolve her daddy issues. Norville rebels against his father's beta lifestyle. Fred fights against his family's anti-feminist ways.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We kick things off by appraising the actions of some of the larger beasts that take to the roads in Big Rigs, before moving on to the smaller creatures in Two-Wheeled Terrors.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We kick things off by appraising the actions of some of the larger beasts that take to the roads in Big Rigs, before moving on to the smaller creatures in Two-Wheeled Terrors.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We try to inject a bit of culture as we get to grips with The Art Of Overtaking, before realising there's no culture in car crashes, when we showcase another round of Off Road Rodeo.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts alongside the regulars with guest performer Nyima Funk and star guest from Nikita, Maggie Q. Maggie gets increasingly Irish with Ryan in a drink and food fuelled Helping Hands.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts alongside the regulars with guest performer Nyima Funk and star guest from Nikita, Maggie Q. Maggie gets increasingly Irish with Ryan in a drink and food fuelled Helping Hands.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo, and Carly Aquilino try to fit into tight spots and reel in more than they can handle.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo, and Carly Aquilino try to fit into tight spots and reel in more than they can handle.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and special guest Draya Michele get called by their government while getting "Name Shamed" search for keys to "Unlock the Door" and get soaked with their "Useless Umbrellas".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and special guest Draya Michele get called by their government while getting "Name Shamed" search for keys to "Unlock the Door" and get soaked with their "Useless Umbrellas".

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne divides his band five ways for a task. Jenny Eclair shares odd facts about trumpets and piles, while Frankie Boyle unleashes fierce opinions about golf.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Sergeant Andy Meale helps a woman suffering an anxiety attack, and there's a two-car collision involving a police vehicle.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A biker thinks he's bulletproof - he's got the vest to prove it, Constable Roya Shields finds a missing person, and a drunk challenges an officer to a fight.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark Cromwell and his team head off the map to deliver a massive switchroom and two huge generators across to Micronesia. Recently flooded roads stop Steve Grahame dead in his tracks on his way to Docker River.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: This season, the balance of power on the winter roads is turned upside down. Reigning champ Polar Industries is looking to maintain their dominance but trucking rival, Darrell Ward, isn't backing down.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: This season, the balance of power on the winter roads is turned upside down. Reigning champ Polar Industries is looking to maintain their dominance but trucking rival, Darrell Ward, isn't backing down.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: In the premiere episode, Craig LeBeau and his team are pushed to the breaking point after a serious accident with a fully loaded logging truck traps their lead driver.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers head to Arcadia, where Darrell gives and takes, Ivy's prospects soar, and Rene and Casey find a his and hers locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Not even the 'cupped hands' of San Bernardino can save Mary's fortune, but Ivy manages to scrape together a bit of coin, while Kenny finds all the magic.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Not even the 'cupped hands' of San Bernardino can save Mary's fortune, but Ivy manages to scrape together a bit of coin, while Kenny finds all the magic.

programme.desc: Sergeant Andy Meale helps a woman suffering an anxiety attack, and there's a two-car collision involving a police vehicle.

programme.desc: A biker thinks he's bulletproof - he's got the vest to prove it, Constable Roya Shields finds a missing person, and a drunk challenges an officer to a fight.

programme.desc: Host Glen Powell; Olivia Dean performs.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver
programme.desc: John Oliver brings his sharp perspective and wit to social, political, and cultural issues, offering a unique and distinct voice each week.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver
programme.desc: John Oliver brings his sharp perspective and wit to social, political, and cultural issues, offering a unique and distinct voice each week.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Set in the dreaded DMV office, following quirky minimum-wage employees who make the best of dealing with annoyed customers, finding solace in each other's company.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Chaos at the DMV drives a new hire to quit, leaving Colette worried Noa will too. Staff and customers battle the heat with a failing air conditioner.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Chaos at the DMV drives a new hire to quit, leaving Colette worried Noa will too. Staff and customers battle the heat with a failing air conditioner.

programme.title: Krapopolis
programme.desc: Shlub's gambling habit spirals out of control as Tyrannis and Stupendous embark on a seafaring adventure.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: This season, the balance of power on the winter roads is turned upside down. Reigning champ Polar Industries is looking to maintain their dominance but trucking rival, Darrell Ward, isn't backing down.

programme.desc: The buyers head to Arcadia, where Darrell gives and takes, Ivy's prospects soar, and Rene and Casey find a his and hers locker.

programme.desc: The 2010-2011 Ashes Series, Australia's Mike Hussey and Mitchell Johnson threw everything they had at a historic series run for England.

programme.title: Ashes: 2021/22 4th Test
programme.desc: The 2021/22 Ashes witnessed the new Test captain, Pat Cummins, silencing critics against a misfiring Joe Root-led England. Head, Labuschagne, and Khawaja put on a batting clinic, while debutant Scotty Boland got '6 at the G'.

programme.desc: The 2021/22 Ashes witnessed the new Test captain, Pat Cummins, silencing critics against a misfiring Joe Root-led England. Head, Labuschagne, and Khawaja put on a batting clinic, while debutant Scotty Boland got '6 at the G'.

programme.desc: The World Test Champions will be in for a tough challenge as they travel to the subcontinent to take on India.

programme.title: WBBL Mini: STA v REN
programme.desc: The first Melbourne Derby of the year gets underway as Meg Lanning's Stars meet Sophie Molineux's Renegades.

programme.title: WBBL The Blast
programme.desc: The Blast brings you all the analysis and laughs from the first week of WBBL action.

programme.desc: Tahlia McGrath's Strikers face the Scorchers' star pair, Beth Mooney and Sophie Devine.

programme.desc: The Blast brings you all the analysis and laughs from the first week of WBBL action.

programme.title: Ashes: 2002/03 5th Test
programme.desc: The 2002/03 features an Australian outfit in their prime. A relentless bowling attack from Glenn McGrath and Jason Gillespie, a stunning MCG Test double century for Justin Langer, and finally, an Australian legend gets his "Perfect Day."

programme.desc: Fox Cricket's Mark Howard, Adam Gilchrist, Mark Waugh and Michael Vaughan preview this year's Ashes.

programme.desc: Witness the very best of Mitchell Starc, delivering instant carnage and claiming crucial wickets in the very first over.

programme.title: Ashes: 2006/07 3rd Test
programme.desc: The legendary 2006-2007 Ashes series. Led by Ricky Ponting, the team showcased a brilliant all-round performance, with notable contributions from Shane Warne and Glenn McGrath in their final series.

programme.title: Ashes: 2006/07 3rd Test
programme.desc: The legendary 2006-2007 Ashes series. Led by Ricky Ponting, the team showcased a brilliant all-round performance, with notable contributions from Shane Warne and Glenn McGrath in their final series.

programme.title: Live: USPGA: Bermuda Championship FR
programme.desc: Final round action of the Bermuda Championship begins from Port Royal Golf Course.

programme.title: Live: USPGA: Bermuda Championship FR
programme.desc: Final round action of the Bermuda Championship begins from Port Royal Golf Course.

programme.title: How Good is Golf: Eastlake
programme.desc: How Good Is Golf shows you how to play, where to play and what equipment to use. Join Paul Gow as he takes you through the greatest game of all.

programme.title: How Good is Golf: Eastlake
programme.desc: How Good Is Golf shows you how to play, where to play and what equipment to use. Join Paul Gow as he takes you through the greatest game of all.

programme.desc: Final round action of the Tour Championship begins from Jumeirah Golf Estates, Dubai.

programme.desc: Final round action of the Tour Championship begins from Jumeirah Golf Estates, Dubai.

programme.title: Golf: DP World Tour C'ship FR
programme.desc: Final round action of the Tour Championship begins from Jumeirah Golf Estates, Dubai.

programme.title: Golf: Getting a Round In: Kitty Flanagan
programme.desc: Series featuring celebrities who love the game of golf.

programme.title: Golf: Getting a Round In: Kitty Flanagan
programme.desc: Series featuring celebrities who love the game of golf.

programme.title: USPGA: Sony Open Final Round
programme.desc: The Opening Drive continues with the Sony Open in Hawaii, from Waialae Country Club.

programme.title: Twins
programme.desc: An experiment to create a perfect human produced not one, but two twins in mismatched shapes. They set off on a comic adventure to find their mother.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: A Special Operations veteran is now into peace, serenity and non-violence. But when Trautman is held by the Soviets and interrogated, the CIA can do nothing and Rambo must come to his aid.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is called into action when a prominent businessman, who may be connected to Colombian drug cartels, is murdered.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A small-town police chief investigates the life of an unhappy teen after her corpse is found floating in a lake.

programme.title: Chris Watts: Confessions of a Killer
Inferno
programme.desc: When Robert Langdon wakes up in an Italian hospital with amnesia, he teams up with Dr Sienna Brooks, and together they must race across Europe against the clock to foil a deadly global plot.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five best friends from college reunite 10 years later for a wild bachelorette weekend in Miami. Their partying takes a dark turn when they accidentally kill a male stripper.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: When three friends wake up in a trashed Las Vegas hotel room after a bachelor party, they realise the groom is missing and must piece together the night's events - one hazy clue at a time.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: A poignant and often hilarious story about Shelby, a headstrong young girl about to get married, with six amazing women providing strength, friendship and love in a small southern town.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Aliens have come to Earth in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, a man must come to the defence of his estranged children.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: In an age of oppression and shameless tyranny, an outlaw becomes the unlikely hero that saves a nation and inspires generations to fight for freedom.

programme.title: Lake Placid
programme.desc: An investigative team, armed with state-of-the-art equipment and a biting sense of sarcasm, must work together to defeat Black Lake's most ferocious resident: a 30-foot prehistoric crocodile.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: The lead-footed crew reunites in this turbo-fuelled tale of the vengeful brother of an international terrorist who sets his bloody sights on the boy racers that took his sibling down.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Based on the classic Hasbro naval combat game, this is the story of an international fleet of ships that come across an alien armada while on a naval war games exercise.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Florida's coolest undercover cops hit the streets to take down a ruthless international drug cartel.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Armed with the knowledge of his wayward client's identity, the Jackal tracks him down in Munich, determined to settle the score.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Armed with the knowledge of his wayward client's identity, the Jackal tracks him down in Munich, determined to settle the score.

programme.title: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: The Ristuccia family celebrates their father's birthday with a huge party.

programme.title: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: A funeral causes chaos as tensions in the family rise.

programme.title: Cheeky Business
programme.desc: When Toni visits the new offices of Marc Dorcel and engages in a meeting with the team, a strong desire for partnership arises.

programme.title: Cheeky Business
programme.desc: When Toni visits the new offices of Marc Dorcel and engages in a meeting with the team, a strong desire for partnership arises.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: An au pair is found murdered in Kings Cross. Vivienne and Rob probe the circumstances surrounding Sarah's disappearance.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The chairman of the Classic Car Restoration Society is found dead next to his beloved El Dorado with a lungful of gasoline. Was this a petrol siphoning accident or something more deliberate?

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The chairman of the Classic Car Restoration Society is found dead next to his beloved El Dorado with a lungful of gasoline. Was this a petrol siphoning accident or something more deliberate?

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Wendy and Seamus return to the woods with company. The truth is out there. Good riddance to it.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Wendy and Seamus return to the woods with company. The truth is out there. Good riddance to it.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Armed with the knowledge of his wayward client's identity, the Jackal tracks him down in Munich, determined to settle the score.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Armed with the knowledge of his wayward client's identity, the Jackal tracks him down in Munich, determined to settle the score.

programme.title: Irma Vep
programme.desc: After an epic blow-up on set, the fate of Rene's series is put in jeopardy. Mira grows more entwined with her role as Irma Vep.

programme.title: Irma Vep
programme.desc: After an epic blow-up on set, the fate of Rene's series is put in jeopardy. Mira grows more entwined with her role as Irma Vep.

programme.title: Irma Vep
programme.desc: Mira uses her new-found powers as Irma Vep to probe deeper into the lives of those around her. Regina shares news that threatens to upend her relationship with Mira.

programme.title: Irma Vep
programme.desc: Mira uses her new-found powers as Irma Vep to probe deeper into the lives of those around her. Regina shares news that threatens to upend her relationship with Mira.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The chairman of the Classic Car Restoration Society is found dead next to his beloved El Dorado with a lungful of gasoline. Was this a petrol siphoning accident or something more deliberate?

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The chairman of the Classic Car Restoration Society is found dead next to his beloved El Dorado with a lungful of gasoline. Was this a petrol siphoning accident or something more deliberate?

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Wendy and Seamus return to the woods with company. The truth is out there. Good riddance to it.

programme.title: Irma Vep
programme.desc: After an epic blow-up on set, the fate of Rene's series is put in jeopardy. Mira grows more entwined with her role as Irma Vep.

programme.title: Irma Vep
programme.desc: After an epic blow-up on set, the fate of Rene's series is put in jeopardy. Mira grows more entwined with her role as Irma Vep.

programme.title: Irma Vep
programme.desc: Mira uses her new-found powers as Irma Vep to probe deeper into the lives of those around her. Regina shares news that threatens to upend her relationship with Mira.

programme.title: Irma Vep
programme.desc: Mira uses her new-found powers as Irma Vep to probe deeper into the lives of those around her. Regina shares news that threatens to upend her relationship with Mira.

programme.title: Irma Vep
programme.desc: In her final days shooting The Vampires, Mira grapples with her experience playing Irma Vep coming to a close.

programme.title: Irma Vep
programme.desc: In her final days shooting The Vampires, Mira grapples with her experience playing Irma Vep coming to a close.

programme.title: Dreamland
programme.desc: The family gather at the hospital as Mel tries to make amends with Clare; as a last resort, Trish enlists Mel to help her track down a missing Spencer.

programme.title: Dreamland
programme.desc: The family gather at the hospital as Mel tries to make amends with Clare; as a last resort, Trish enlists Mel to help her track down a missing Spencer.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene looks for Stephanie after she mysteriously goes missing, Connie investigates a story on Trooper Davis, and Carol helps Hornsby with a labour dispute at a drug farm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron and Maggie meet Gov Pamela Milton as she tours Alexandria, Oceanside and Hilltop. Ezekiel finds himself lucky during a routine check-up. Eugene processes Max's story.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron and Maggie meet Gov Pamela Milton as she tours Alexandria, Oceanside and Hilltop. Ezekiel finds himself lucky during a routine check-up. Eugene processes Max's story.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: When an elite assassin, the Jackal, carries out his latest kill, it catches the attention of a British intelligence officer, who starts to hunt him down.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: With his previous client backing out of payment, the Jackal's reputation is on the line and he starts to plot revenge.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: Morning Show: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: The murder of a supermarket owner puts TV chef Billie Blessings and Detective Ian Jackson on the trail of a possible serial killer.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna, the world's most famous movie star, and William, a stagnant business owner, cross paths and fall in love. But can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: The Munsters
programme.desc: From Rob Zombie comes the strangest love story ever told as Herman and Lily's crazy courtship takes The Munsters on a hauntingly hilarious trip from Transylvania to Hollywood.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: Grand-Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: When Frank Collins (Reno Wilson) suffers from writer's block, he decides to start a day care for his father-in-law (Danny Trejo) and other seniors as a way to make quick cash, while giving him time to still work on his next book. Eventually getting a small group to care for, Frank soon learns that these are not your typical seniors and they can't easily be corralled. With a code enforcement officer challenging the legality of his business, and his senior charges getting into all kinds of trouble, Frank's work days become anything but effortless. Featuring an all-star cast of TV's greatest stars, Grand-Daddy Day Care is a hilarious story for the young, and young at heart.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: In this hilarious animated adventure comedy, you'll finally find out why the birds are so angry. In an island paradise populated entirely by happy, flightless birds - or almost entirely, Red, a bird with a temper problem, speedy Chuck, and the volatile Bomb have always been outsiders. But when the island is visited by mysterious green piggies, it's up to these unlikely outcasts to figure out what the pigs are up to.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of BOB, Link, Dr Cockroach, and Susan as they learn to adapt to a new world and work side-by-side.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee appears at the door of a stressed young mother, who is trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war. But once she's arrived, Nanny McPhee discovers that the children are fighting a war of their own against two spoiled city cousins who have just moved in and refuse to leave.

programme.title: Arthur Christmas
programme.desc: On Christmas night at the North Pole, Santa's youngest son looks to use his father's high-tech operation for an urgent mission.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: A legendary rivalry re-emerges when Jerry moves into New York City's finest hotel on the eve of the wedding of the century, forcing the desperate event planner to hire Tom to get rid of him. As mayhem ensues, the escalating cat-and-mouse battle soon threatens to destroy her career, the wedding, and possibly the hotel itself.

programme.title: Abominable
programme.desc: When teenage Yi encounters a young Yeti on the roof of her apartment building in a modern Chinese city, she and her mischievous friends, Jin and Peng, name him Everest and embark on an epic quest to reunite the magical creature with his family at the highest point on Earth. But the trio of friends will have to stay one-step ahead of Burnish, a wealthy man intent on capturing a Yeti, and zoologist Dr. Zara to help Everest get home.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: The web-spinning superhero must battle his own demons and a barrage of new villains including Sandman and Venom.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: Half-human, half-Atlantean Arthur Curry goes on a journey that will not only force him to face who he really is, but to discover if he is worthy of who he was born to be, a king.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: Man With No Past
programme.desc: A man wakes up in a strange city with no memory. His search for answers leads to a clash with a powerful enemy, uncovering the truth about his identity.

programme.title: Flight 149: Hostage of War
programme.desc: In 1990, Iraq takes the world by surprise and invades Kuwait. BA Flight 149 from London lands in Kuwait for a scheduled stop with men, women and children aboard. The plane never reaches its final destination.

programme.title: Piece by Piece
programme.desc: LEGO bricks tell the life story of singer, songwriter and record producer Pharrell Williams - from his childhood in Virginia to his success in the music and fashion industry.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: National Security
programme.desc: Everyone wants them dead, but they might just kill each other first. Two police academy rejects are at each other's throats and on the case of a smuggler with friends in high places.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: When he is ruled to be property and not a person, a foul-mouthed teddy bear seeks the aid of a legendary civil rights attorney to gain the justice he deserves.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: When he is ruled to be property and not a person, a foul-mouthed teddy bear seeks the aid of a legendary civil rights attorney to gain the justice he deserves.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: A politician's wish to change the world is heard by God, who asks him to build a modern Noah's ark. The animals and the flood arrive, along with the laughs.

programme.title: The Cable Guy
programme.desc: A lonely, unhinged cable TV installer goes crazy as he forces his friendship on a lovelorn bachelor. A black comedy with pointed social commentary.
